name: content-calendar-skill
description: GenPark AI Agent Skill - Generate monthly marketing content calendars with post ideas, themes, hashtags, and channel schedules for e-commerce brands.
author: genpark

product_category.description: Product category (beauty, fitness, fashion, food, tech).

posts_per_week.description: Target posts per week per channel.

calendar.description: Day-by-day content calendar with post ideas and channels.
